---
title: Individual Assignment 3 (10%)
---

Coming soon. 🚒

<!-- The data you are to forecast is the same series you used in IA2.  -->

<!-- **Files for download**: -->

<!-- * Download the template -->

<!-- ::: {.callout appearance="minimal"} -->
<!-- <i class="bi bi-download"></i> [IA3_template.qmd](../assignment_data/IA3_template.qmd){download="IA3_template.qmd"} -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- ::: {.callout appearance="minimal"} -->
<!-- <i class="bi bi-download"></i> [IA3 suggested solutions.html](Assignment3Solutions.html){download="Assignment3Solutions.html"} -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- You are to submit both an `IA3_NameSurname.qmd` file and a compiled `IA3_NameSurname.pdf` file for your assignment. -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- #| output: asis -->
<!-- source(here::here("course_info.R")) -->
<!-- submit(schedule, "IA3") -->
<!-- ``` -->
